program_name: Performance Major (All Instruments except Piano, Voice and Jazz) (L.Mus.) (93 credits)
description: The Licentiate in Music (L.Mus.) Major Performance in All Instruments except Piano, Voice, and Jazz is a 93-credit program. Ensemble Requirements Students majoring in violin, viola, or cello must commence their assigned ensembles with four terms of string quartets. Violin Majors will be required to complete two terms of ensemble playing on viola. Special Requirements Continuation in the program requires a minimum grade of A- in practical instruction/exams and ensembles. Students must take the L.Mus. Performance 1 Examination at the end of their first year of study and the L.Mus. Performance 2 and 3 Examinations in each of the next two years if they hope to complete the program in the normal length of time.
